overall.description: A nighttime scene from a Western video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character with a lantern walking through rocky wilderness, approaching a horse, and leading it along a dirt path through open grassland under a cloudy moonlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff edge overlooking river canyon

events.description: character turns away from cliff edge and begins walking inland

agents.ego_description: character stands at cliff edge overlooking the river, then turns and walks away from the edge into the rocky terrain

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff edge dropping down to the river below
dark river flowing through the canyon with steep banks
rocky plateau formations visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rocky cliff edge at night, with the character standing overlooking a dark river canyon. The character turns away from the edge and begins walking inland across the rocky terrain, leaving the canyon behind.

events.description: character reaches the horse standing in the grass with a lantern

agents.ego_description: character walks through rocky grassland holding a lantern, approaching the horse waiting ahead

notable_agents.action: horse standing still with saddle and gear, waiting for the character to approach

entered.detail: large rocks scattered across the grassy ground between cliff and prairie
tufts of dry grass growing between the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the cliff, the character traverses a transition zone of rocky grassland scattered with boulders. The character approaches a horse standing in the grass, reaching it as the terrain begins to open up into prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with scattered trees

events.description: character takes the horse's reins and begins leading it forward along the path
moon becomes visible through breaking clouds, slightly increasing ambient illumination

agents.ego_description: character leads the horse by reins, walking steadily along the dirt path through the open grassland

notable_agents.action: horse being led by reins, following closely behind the character along the trail

entered.detail: well-trodden dirt trail winding through the tall grass
large oak trees scattered across the prairie landscape
dark silhouette of mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character leads the horse along a dirt path through open prairie, with tall grass on either side and scattered oak trees visible. The lantern illuminates the path ahead as they walk, and the moon occasionally breaks through the clouds, casting faint light on the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate cliffside overlooking a canyon into the expansive openness of a moonlit prairie. It begins at the edge of a rocky precipice at night, where the character turns away from a dark river canyon to trek inland across the rugged terrain. As the character moves further from the cliff, the landscape transitions into a rocky grassland scattered with boulders before opening up into a wide prairie. The scene then shifts as the character reaches a waiting horse and begins leading it along a dirt path flanked by tall grass and scattered oak trees. Finally, the lantern illuminates the immediate trail while the moon breaks through the clouds to cast a faint glow over the distant mountains.
